page.name: Home
page.description: Dragon's Dogma Online private server homepage. Displays server features, connection details, and call to action.

page.name: About
page.description: Server features overview. Highlights rebalanced crafting, EXP progression, endgame content, hardcore mode, and more.

page.name: News
page.description: Latest updates, patch notes, server announcements, and community events.

page.name: How To Play
page.description: 7-step setup guide covering game download, extraction, launcher configuration, account creation, English patch, and first play.

page.name: Game Download — Mirror 1
page.description: Full game client (15 GB) hosted on Google Drive.

page.name: Game Download — Mirror 2
page.description: Full game client (15 GB) hosted on Google Drive — backup mirror.

page.name: Game Download — Mirror 3
page.description: Full game client (15 GB) hosted on Google Drive — backup mirror.

page.name: Game Download — Mirror 4
page.description: Full game client (15 GB) hosted on Google Drive — backup mirror.

page.name: Launcher
page.description: Community DDON launcher available on GitHub releases.

page.name: Interactive Maps
page.description: Hub page for selecting interactive game maps covering enemy spawns, gathering nodes, shops, and exchanges.

page.name: Normal Map
page.description: Interactive map for normal-mode stages. Shows enemy spawns, gathering nodes, and shops.

page.name: Endgame Map
page.description: Interactive map for endgame stages. Shows enemy spawns, gathering nodes, and shops.

page.name: Contact
page.description: Contact form with fields for name, email, and message. Includes a link to the Discord server for faster support.

page.name: Discord
page.description: Official Dogma Rising Discord community. Linked from every page header for community support.
